input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7182 [Automation] java run fails for org.json4s:json4s-jackson_2.13:3.7.0-M16; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is a source/API compatibility issue: in 3.7.0-M16, org.json4s.Reader requires readEither, so existing generated Reader implementations may need test-code updates. This is not deterministic setup.
Meaningful native-image coverage will still depend on exercising json4s reflection/extraction paths so metadata for test case classes is generated or maintained.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: json4s-jackson_2.13 is an in-process Scala JSON library; its documented Jackson usage works with the artifact and its declared transitive dependencies, with no external service, Docker image, environment variable, or system property needed for meaningful tests.
